# Sleep Golden Vectors

These vectors characterize sleep protobuf mapping before KMP migration. They pin sleep start/end offset behavior, timezone offset preservation, sleep-stage hypnogram ordering, and omitted optional field policy for partial nights. `SleepNightlyRechargeCommonPolicyTest.kt` now executes shared end-offset mapping, embedded timezone-to-UTC instant mapping, hypnogram and sleep-cycle order preservation, sleep-stage enum mapping, partial-night omitted optional policy, and the combined `sdk/nightly-recharge/sleep-nightly-readiness.json` behavior-family gate before production sleep model code moves. The sleep-offset vector exposes the current Android/iOS end-offset difference; shared KMP model code should choose the protobuf end-offset mapping and handle any legacy platform compatibility outside common code.
